chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Const. Petition No.D-896 of 2023 Date Order with signature of Judge 1. For orders on office objection at flag ‘A` 2. For hearing of main case 13-12-2023 Mr. Gulshan Ahmed Shujrah, Advocate for the Petitioner Mr. Ghulam Abbas Kubar, Assistant Advocate General Najaf Ali Janwri, on behalf of Municipal Committee Khairpur.-.-.-. -.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- Respondent No.2 has submitted a cheque of Rs.100,000/-/- bearing No.41781637 Sindh Bank Khairpur Branch dated 06.12.2023, towards the pensionary benefits of petitioner. He further undertakes that a monthly installment of Rs.100,000/- would be paid to the petitioner towards his remaining pensionary benefits. The cheque shall be deposited with the Accountant of this court who shall pay it to the petitioner in person on proper verification and identification. Learned counsel for the petitioner is satisfied and this petition is accordingly disposed of in the above terms. JUDGE JUDGE Sulemen Khan/PA
